hero.title: Build The World's First AI Health Companion Together
hero.subtitle: Join our community-funded AI health project. Your contribution helps us build AI models, train medical knowledge systems, develop apps, and make personalized health guidance accessible to everyone.

home.aiAssistantDesc: Get personalized health guidance powered by AI, trained on medical knowledge and constantly updated.
home.founderSubtitle: Be part of the founding community. Support the project and unlock exclusive benefits.
home.fundUsageSubtitle: Full transparency on how your contributions are used to build the platform.
home.toolsSubtitle: Comprehensive AI-powered health tools and knowledge library at your fingertips.
home.architectureSubtitle: A modular, scalable system designed for global health knowledge

ai.title: AI Health Assistant
ai.subtitle: Describe your symptoms and get AI-powered health guidance
ai.placeholder: Describe your symptoms... e.g. I have a headache and feel tired
ai.disclaimer: This AI assistant provides general health information only and is not a substitute for professional medical advice. Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for medical concerns.

footer.tagline: Building the world's first AI health companion, together.

faq.a1: SynoChain AI is a community-funded AI health companion platform that combines AI technology with comprehensive medical knowledge to provide personalized health guidance.
faq.q2: How does the AI Health Assistant work?
faq.a2: Our AI assistant uses advanced language models trained on medical knowledge to analyze your symptoms and provide possible factors, related conditions, and suggested next steps.
faq.a3: Yes, we take privacy seriously. All health data is encrypted and stored securely. You control your data and can delete it at any time.
faq.q4: What's the difference between AI Pioneer and Lifetime Founder?
faq.a4: AI Pioneer ($29) gives you 1 year of AI Health Assistant access, while Lifetime Founder ($199) provides permanent access plus exclusive benefits like NFT certificates and voting rights.
faq.q5: When will the mobile app be available?
faq.a5: We're developing iOS and Android apps. Founder members will get priority access to beta testing once available.
